writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a historical fact
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a historical invention or building, using Passive Voice (Past Simple).
writing.sampleAnswer: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell. This bridge was built about thirty years ago. The company was founded a hundred years ago.
checklist: Có ít nhất 1 mốc thời gian cụ thể
Có thể thêm by + agent nếu cần

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe media coverage
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing news/media coverage, using Passive Voice (Present Perfect).
writing.sampleAnswer: The news has already been published online. The event has been announced on the radio. The results have just been reported on TV.
checklist: Dùng has/have been + V3 đúng dạng
Có ít nhất 2 phương tiện truyền thông khác nhau
Có thể dùng already/just để nhấn mạnh
